title: micromeria filiformis subsp. filiformis
intro: Micromeria filiformis subsp. filiformis, also known as Mountain Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant's essential oils have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Micromeria filiformis subsp. filiformis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
